alternate_phrasings: Where are you pursuing your degree?

answer: I am currently pursuing my B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science at Vel Tech High Tech College (2024 - 2028). I maintain a strong academic record with an undergraduate CGPA of 8.91, alongside roles like Class Representative and Placement Coordinator.
